current_sprint.sprint_name: Admin Dashboard, Analytics, Audit Logs, Delivery Rates
current_sprint.goal: US-081 admin dashboard counts, US-082 certification analytics by region/product, US-085 HTTP audit interceptor + log viewer, US-088 notification delivery rates
current_sprint.note: AuditInterceptor global APP_INTERCEPTOR — zero per-module work. DashboardService raw SQL via DataSource across all 4 schemas — no cross-module imports. US-088 extends existing stats endpoint. Batches 2+3 merged: DashboardService must be created before AdminController that imports it.

sprint10_changes: GET /notifications/stats now returns byChannel: [{ channel, sent, failed, deliveryRate }]
known_gaps: notification-template.service.ts lines 45-59 (seedFromFiles loop body — requires live filesystem fixtures)
notification.service.ts lines 78-79, 128-129 (fs.existsSync/readFileSync file fallback — requires .hbs file on disk)

pending_migrations: 1700000000009-AddProductTypeValidityDays — ALTER TABLE product.product_type ADD COLUMN validity_days INT NULL
1700000000012-AddLabTestReportKey — ALTER TABLE product.lab_test ADD report_s3_key, report_file_name
1700000000014-AddAuditLog — CREATE SCHEMA common + CREATE TABLE common.audit_log + 2 indexes

unit.coverage_note: Known gap: seedFromFiles() + fs.existsSync/readFileSync paths require live .hbs fixtures — not exercisable in unit tests

integration.note: Testcontainers-based; run with docker compose up

e2e.note: Self-initializing DB via createTestApp(); run with docker compose up

npm run migration:run

Sprint 11 planning — recommended scope: 19–24 SP
Sprint 11 top candidates:
US-090: System settings config — 8 SP (High) — LAST high-priority story — anchor for Sprint 11
US-058: Track QR scan events — 5 SP (Low) — 4th deferral
US-077: Notification preferences — 3 SP (Low)
US-020: Export product registry data — 3 SP (Low)
US-069: View HS code assignments — 2 SP (Low)
US-070: Export clearances by destination — 3 SP (Low)
US-050: Export certification compliance report — 5 SP (Low)
US-053: QR offline verification — 13 SP (Medium) — large, consider splitting
US-027: ONSSA lab integration — 13 SP (Low) — Phase 2
Option A (conservative): US-090 + US-069 + US-070 + US-077 + US-020 = 19 SP
Option B (full velocity): US-090 + US-058 + US-077 + US-020 + US-050 = 24 SP
decisions_made: AuditInterceptor as global APP_INTERCEPTOR — single registration covers all routes, zero per-module work
AuditInterceptor skips unauthenticated requests (no req.user) — public endpoints not logged
AuditLog.record() fire-and-forget — void + silent catch — never blocks response path
DashboardService raw SQL via DataSource — no cross-module service imports; queries 4 schemas directly
AuditLog no updatedAt — append-only immutability mirrors CertificationEvent pattern
US-088 extends stats (not new endpoint) — 3 SP story; deliveryRate is arithmetic on existing data
getAnalytics() positional params ($1, $2) — consistent with onssaReport() pattern
getAnalytics() parallel Promise.all — two independent GROUP BY queries, no dependency
Batches 2+3 merged during execution — DashboardService must be created before AdminController that imports it
VELOCITY-TRACKER.md updated with Sprints 6–10 — was 5 sprints stale
MinIO chosen over local disk: files survive container restarts, Phase 2 cloud S3 swap = one config change
NestJS StreamableFile proxy chosen over presigned URLs: consistent with existing PDF pattern, MinIO stays internal
US-030 lab accreditation: YAGNI metadata only — no enforcement on POST /lab-tests in v1. Phase 2 enforcement.
US-083 cooperative compliance: cooperativeName already denormalized on Certification entity — zero migration needed
ExportDocumentPdfService: intra-module JOIN ExportDocument + Certification allowed (same certification schema, not cross-module)
File upload MIME validation: US-026 lab report enforces application/pdf only via BadRequestException
Multer MemoryStorage: file buffer in RAM → MinIO. 10MB limit for product docs, 20MB for lab reports.
MinioService.onModuleInit(): auto-creates bucket if it doesn't exist — zero manual setup required
MinioService registered in both AppModule (global) AND ProductModule (local injection for services that need it)
Route ordering: GET /certifications/compliance-report + /onssa-report + /analytics registered before GET /:id
Lab entity: no laboratoryId FK on LabTest to Lab in v1 — accreditation is reference data only
US-086 scoped to read-only (YAGNI): GET /users/me + GET /users/me/roles from JWT claims only — no Keycloak Admin API
US-010 soft deactivation: status = 'suspended' on Cooperative entity, Kafka event published
US-016 soft deactivation: isActive = false on ProductType, ConflictException if already inactive
US-044 guard: assignInspector() throws ConflictException for completed AND cancelled — only scheduled allows reassignment
US-076 cache key: stats:notifications:{from|all}:{to|all} TTL 300s — consistent with certification stats pattern
Route ordering rule confirmed: GET /notifications/stats before GET /notifications/:id (NestJS literal-before-param)
Two-file ceremony: InspectionInspectorAssignedEvent added to common interface + certification-events.ts barrel
TM-3 approach: drop all 4 schemas + migration table, re-run fresh — necessary due to pre-existing schema state
QrCode.hmacSignature: added unique:true to entity column decorator to match DB constraint
PDF library: PDFKit (zero Docker changes, pure Node.js, supports RTL text alignment)
PDF layout: single multilingual page (FR primary + AR RTL block + ZGH block)
Arabic shaping: Amiri-Regular.ttf with align:right — full ligature shaping via pdfkit-arabic is Phase 2
Stats dimensions: status + region + product type + date range filter — YAGNI (no trend charts in v1)
Stats cache: Redis 300s, cache key stats:certifications:{from|all}:{to|all}
Template storage: DB-override + file fallback (existsSync → readFileSync) — safe default, rollback = DELETE record
Template cache: Redis 600s per code:channel:language key, DEL on PUT/DELETE
jest.mock('fs') anti-pattern: blanket fs mock conflicts with TypeORM path-scurry — use real fs (existsSync returns false in test env)
CACHE_MANAGER must be provided in all test modules that use CertificationService or NotificationService
GET /certifications/stats registered before GET /certifications/:id to prevent NestJS UUID param collision
useValue (not useFactory) for all test mocks that need external control
em.create() + em.save() pattern for TypeORM JSONB strict typing
Modular monolith architecture chosen over microservices for v1
Redpanda over Apache Kafka (lighter, Kafka-compatible)
PostgreSQL schemas per module (not separate databases)
HMAC-SHA256 for QR code signing
CertificationEvent ledger: append-only, currentStatus materialized column
applyTransition() uses dataSource.transaction() for atomic event + status update

sprint_7.note: TM-3 finally done — schema drift fixed

sprint_8.note: US-018/US-029 free (no role restriction existed). US-025 1 SP (PartialType already covered it).

sprint_9.note: MinIO infrastructure added. File uploads via MemoryStorage + MinIO. Lab accreditation YAGNI metadata.

sprint_10.note: AuditInterceptor global APP_INTERCEPTOR. DashboardService raw SQL. US-088 extends stats. Batches 2+3 merged.

backlog_status.note: US-081, US-082, US-085, US-088 marked Done this sprint. US-027 and US-053 are 13 SP each — may be split or deferred.
